movement.name: Air Dash
movement.description: Allows the player to dash through the air, covering a greater distance than a regular jump.

movement.name: Double Jump
movement.description: Allows the player to jump again while in the air, providing increased mobility and access to higher areas.

utility.name: Time Slow
utility.description: Slows down time for a short duration, allowing the player to react to fast-moving obstacles or enemies.
